description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set within a landscaped lot, surrounded by numerous trees and greenery. The structure features a low, horizontal profile with a mix of flat and gently sloped roof sections, and several distinct building volumes connected by walkways and patios. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of muted earth tones, with some sections highlighted by red or brown roofing and accent panels. Multiple windows of varying sizes are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property includes a driveway with a carport or garage, as well as paved walkways and outdoor seating areas. The overall layout is open and spacious, with clear separation between private and communal outdoor spaces.
description: A single-story bungalow with a low, horizontal profile, surrounded by trees and featuring flat and gently sloped roofs, asymmetrical windows, and a mix of muted earth tones. The property includes a driveway, carport, and landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, carport, and a dense arrangement of trees along the perimeter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, garage, and the rear garden area with more visible outdoor seating and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional trees, and the open layout of the outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the side garden, more trees, and the arrangement of building volumes.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and scattered windows
